summary: Full testing of pricing feature changes: pricing_type=simple handling, intake price adjustments (add/multiply modes), price_rounding, admin catalog UI changes (Pricing column removed, category filter fix). All 27 backend tests and all frontend UI checks pass.

issues: Product with base_price=0 shows 'TOTAL $0.00' alongside 'Request a Quote' button — could confuse users into thinking the product is free. The $0.00 could be hidden or replaced with 'Price on request' in the summary card for RFQ products. Minor UX concern only.

critical_code_review_comments: round_nearest() uses Python banker's rounding (round-half-to-even): e.g. round_nearest(250,100)=200 (not 300). This is mathematically correct but may surprise users who expect conventional rounding. Consider using math.floor(x/n + 0.5)*n for traditional rounding if needed.

pricing_complexity field is still included in ProductsTab productToForm() (defaults to 'SIMPLE') and is sent in save payload. Since backend no longer uses it for pricing calculation, this is harmless but leftover field could be cleaned up.

IntakeSchemaBuilder shows 'Price adjustment mode' radio only when affects_price=true is checked; but the initial question added has affects_price defaulting to False — user must check the checkbox first. This is working correctly but the UI behaviour is as designed.
seed_data_creation: Created test products via backend API during testing (auto-cleaned up by pytest fixture): TEST_PRICING_SimpleFixed, TEST_PRICING_ZeroPrice, TEST_PRICING_AddMode, TEST_PRICING_MultiplyMode, TEST_PRICING_Round100/50/25/NoRounding, TEST_PRICING_UpdateRounding, TEST_PRICING_RoundWithIntake — all deactivated after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pricing features fully verified: (1) pricing_type=simple/fixed both return base_price correctly from /api/pricing/calc. (2) Intake dropdown/multiselect affects_price=true with price_mode=add adds price_value; multiply mode multiplies. (3) price_rounding=25/50/100 rounds subtotal after adjustments. (4) Admin catalog: Pricing complexity column gone, category filter loads all categories (per_page=500), category filter works. (5) Product editor: Price Rounding select present, Pricing Complexity select removed. (6) Customer product page: base_price>0 shows 'Add to cart', base_price=0 shows 'Request a Quote'. Python banker's rounding is used (round-half-to-even). TEST_E2E_Category has 2 products (TEST_E2E_New_Product, TEST_E2E_Product_Updated) both with base_price=0.
rca_of_issue: N/A - All features working as specified. No bugs found.
